diagrams.title: IPv4 Address Structure
diagrams.description: 32-bit address divided into 4 octets of 8 bits each
diagrams.purpose: Understanding binary to decimal conversion and address representation

diagrams.title: IPv4 Class Ranges
diagrams.description: Visual representation of first octet ranges for each class
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for identifying address classes from first octet

diagrams.title: Subnet Mask Binary Layout
diagrams.description: Shows how subnet mask bits correspond to network and host portions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how subnet masks divide addresses

diagrams.title: Subnet Division Concept
diagrams.description: Shows borrowing bits from host portion to create subnets
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing subnet creation and address counting

diagrams.title: Private IP Address Ranges
diagrams.description: Three private address ranges defined in RFC 1918
